s: A supercharged Obtainium: get Android app updates straight from the source.
d: ObtainX is a modern, supercharged fork of Obtainium. Re-engineered with a stunning Material 3 Expressive UI and power-user utilities that make managing your apps effortless. Get updates straight from the source: GitHub, GitLab, F-Droid, IzzyOnDroid, APKMirror, APKPure, and more. No central repository, no account, no tracking. 🚀 ━━ ✨ UNIQUE FEATURES (not in Obtainium) ━━ • Build Verification — cryptographic checks (F-Droid/Izzy reproducible builds and GitHub Release Attestations) flag manipulated binaries before install. ObtainX's own updates carry GitHub attestations too. • Third-Party Installer Support — hand off updates to installers like InstallerX or App Manager to review APK metadata the stock installer hides. Essential under Advanced Protection. • Bulk Import from Device — select apps already on your phone and ObtainX finds their sources automatically — no URL hunting. • Dynamic Folders — named folders, manual or rule-based (by name, author, package ID, category, or source); each keeps its own layout. • On-Demand Only mode — hide rarely-updated apps from the main list and skip them in global scans; check them only when you want. • Configurable swipe gestures — independent left/right actions per row: Update, Install, Pin, Edit, Delete, and more. • Custom app icons — set your own icon for any app, from your gallery or the web. • Undo after delete — swipe- and bulk-delete show a 5-second Undo snackbar. • Verified "also available on" links — each app shows other stores where it's confirmed present. • RegEx Assist — a built-in helper walks you through building version and APK filters — no regex knowledge required. • Know the update size beforehand — see the exact download size before updating. • Skip Version — pass on a release without marking the app "updated." • Stop download — cancel any ongoing download from the app, notification, or queue. • Save assets — save downloaded APKs to a folder of your choice during the update. ━━ 🔧 ENHANCED FEATURES ━━ • APKMirror updates — enabled (disabled upstream), opening the specific release page. • Smarter version status — six distinct states instead of a binary update / up-to-date. • Add App — three paths, one screen — URL, Search, and From Device under one segmented control, results inline. • Editable package ID for track-only sources — restores correct install detection and updates. • Active filter chips — a dismissible chip per active filter; tap to clear it. • Category customization — any color, rename, and bulk assign. ━━ 🎨 UI & UX ━━ • Adaptive tablet, foldable & landscape layout — on large screens a navigation rail replaces the bottom bar and your app list sits side-by-side with the detail page, opening apps in place. Adding and bulk-importing go two-pane too, and adapt in landscape — so big phones and foldables benefit, not just tablets. • Material 3 Expressive across every screen — cards, fluid animations, expressive controls. • A full theme engine — system/light/dark/AMOLED themes, Material You or any hex color, 9 palette algorithms, shading, gradients, progressive blur, corner roundness, and UI scale. • Per-app color theming derived from each app's own icon. • Customizable app rows — app type, source, and category at a glance, as text badges or minimal color strips. • Hero icon transitions, inline collapsible search, inline edit on the detail page, source favicon badges, and auto-hiding action bars. ━━ 🔄 BRING YOUR DATA FROM OBTAINIUM ━━ In Obtainium, export your app list to a .json file (Import/Export → Export). In ObtainX, open the Backup tab and Import it — your tracked apps populate instantly. ━━ 🛡️ FREE & OPEN SOURCE ━━ Free and open-source software (GPLv3). Runs entirely on-device — no accounts, no telemetry, no proprietary services.
